title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 44
instructions: For each question, listen to the short recording and choose the correct picture: A, B or C.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a lost art folder.
questions.audio_script: Boy: Did you find your art folder? You sounded worried this morning. || Girl: Yes, but not where I expected. I went back to the bus stop, because I remembered holding it while I waited. || Boy: And did you check the canteen? You were there later. || Girl: I did, but it was not there. Then my teacher called and said [1]my art folder was in the music room[/1]. I must have left it there without thinking. || Boy: Good. You would need it today. || Girl: Exactly, so I will collect it soon.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Did you find your art folder? You sounded worried this morning.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Yes, but not where I expected. I went back to the bus stop, because I remembered holding it while I waited.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: And did you check the canteen? You were there later.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: I did, but it was not there. Then my teacher called and said my art folder was in the music room. I must have left it there without thinking.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Good. You would need it today.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Exactly, so I will collect it soon.

questions.question: Where is the art folder?

A.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, art folder on a music room chair, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, art folder beside a bus stop bench, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, art folder on a canteen table, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.explanation: The speaker says my art folder was in the music room.

questions.context: You hear two friends making plans for the afternoon.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Are we still going to ride bikes by the river this afternoon? I was looking forward to it. || Girl: I don't think so. My bike has a flat tyre, so that plan will not work. || Woman: We could go bowling instead. || Girl: I checked, but the lanes are fully booked. My cousin suggested another idea, and [1]we are going indoor climbing after school[/1]. || Woman: That sounds fine. What time shall we meet? || Girl: Let's meet at four outside the station, and we can go together.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Are we still going to ride bikes by the river this afternoon? I was looking forward to it.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: I don't think so. My bike has a flat tyre, so that plan will not work.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: We could go bowling instead.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: I checked, but the lanes are fully booked. My cousin suggested another idea, and we are going indoor climbing after school.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That sounds fine. What time shall we meet?

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Let's meet at four outside the station, and we can go together.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, teenagers climbing an indoor wall, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.context: You hear two students talking about the art lesson.
questions.audio_script: Man: What do we need to take for the art lesson tomorrow? I don't want to carry too much. || Boy: The teacher said we do not need to bring paint brushes, because they have enough for everybody. || Man: What about scissors? || Boy: No, not this time. The important thing is this: [1]bring old magazines because we are making picture collages[/1]. || Man: Thanks. I will put it in my bag tonight. || Boy: Good idea. We have to leave early, so do not forget it. || Boy: That should make the rest of the day much easier.

questions.context: You hear two people choosing food in a café.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Have you decided what to get for lunch? The queue is moving quickly. || Man: I first thought about chicken wrap, but it has peppers in it. || Woman: The noodles looks good too. || Man: Maybe, but I ate noodles for lunch. I think [1]I will have the tuna salad because it looks fresh[/1]. || Woman: Good choice. I will order after you. || Man: Great, then we can find a table near the window before it gets busy. || Man: That should make the rest of the day much easier.

questions.context: You hear a school announcement about the chess club.
questions.audio_script: Speaker: This is a message for students joining the chess club today. Please do not go to the canteen, because lunch has not finished. Some students may wait by the room seven, but it is too small. The teacher has changed the room for today only. [1]Everyone should go straight to the library corner after lunch[/1]. Please arrive on time, because the activity will begin as soon as the register is checked. You do not need to bring any extra equipment.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: This is a message for students joining the chess club today. Please do not go to the canteen, because lunch has not finished. Some students may wait by the room seven, but it is too small. The teacher has changed the room for today only. Everyone should go straight to the library corner after lunch. Please arrive on time, because the activity will begin as soon as the register is checked. You do not need to bring any extra equipment.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about travelling to the theatre.
questions.audio_script: Man: How are you getting to the theatre tomorrow? I thought you were going to drive. || Woman: I was, but there is nowhere to park. || Man: Could you use the underground instead? || Woman: I checked, but the station is closed. [1]I am going to walk because it is only ten minutes away[/1]. || Man: That sounds sensible. I will meet you near the entrance when you arrive. || Woman: Great. I will send a message if I am late. || Woman: That should make the rest of the day much easier.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about work in a hotel.
questions.audio_script: Man: What are you doing at the hotel this afternoon? I thought the manager asked you to answer phone calls. || Woman: Not now, because the manager is doing those. || Man: So will you carry luggage? || Woman: No, guests have already arrived. The manager said [1]my job today is to prepare breakfast tables[/1]. || Man: That sounds clear enough. || Woman: Yes, and it should not take too long if the shop stays quiet. I can help you afterwards. || Woman: That should make the rest of the day much easier.
